underlying_goal: Set up per-theme wallpaper configurations for a 4-monitor Hyprland setup with both static (hyprpaper) and animated (mpvpaper) wallpapers, integrated into an existing theme switcher
friction_detail: Hyprpaper wasn't loading wallpapers due to using config-file-only approach instead of hyprctl commands, and the script read the old theme name from .current-theme before it was updated.
brief_summary: User configured wallpapers for 9 themes across 4 monitors with static and video support, iteratively refined assignments, and fixed hyprpaper loading bugs—all largely achieved through many small edits.
